$schema_note: Curated registry of agentic + Bitcoin-payable services an autonomous agent can consume. provenance "curated" = maintained by the editors and verified against primary sources on last_verified; live Nostr-announced inventory (Routstr providers, NIP-87 mints) is served separately at /live/snapshot.json (providers carry probe status: alive | unreachable | unverified-tor-only | unroutable, plus network: clearnet | tor | both | unroutable) and the cross-provider inference price index at /live/models.json — both with committed static fallbacks at /snapshot.json and /models.json. Per-entry machine fields where verified: auth (how the credential works), api_base, pricing_url, quickstart (the first call, one line). Part of https://bitcoineconomy.ai — thesis at /case, methodology at /services-for-agents.
name: The Marketplace directory — bitcoineconomy.ai

automatability_tiers.api-no-account: API with no account — payment or a key is the credential; zero human onboarding
automatability_tiers.api-account: API after account setup — no identity check, but a human creates the account first
automatability_tiers.api-kyc: API after KYC onboarding — automatable once a human completes identity verification
automatability_tiers.limited: No public trading/provisioning API — scheduled or app-driven flows only

payment_method_vocabulary.lightning: Lightning Network (BOLT11/BOLT12 invoices or Lightning address)
payment_method_vocabulary.l402: L402 — HTTP 402 payment protocol over Lightning; the payment is the API credential
payment_method_vocabulary.cashu: Cashu bearer ecash (Bitcoin-denominated); the token is the API key
payment_method_vocabulary.nwc: Nostr Wallet Connect (NIP-47) — remote, scoped wallet control

entries.name: Routstr
entries.summary: A decentralized AI-inference marketplace where a Cashu token is the API key — pay per request in private Bitcoin ecash, no login, no KYC.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: LLM inference — OpenAI-compatible API calls from independent providers
entries.payment_detail: cashu ecash over Lightning (bearer token = API key)
entries.auth: none — a funded Cashu token is the API key
entries.quickstart: Point any OpenAI-compatible client at a provider endpoint with a funded Cashu token as the Bearer key. Per-model sats pricing at {endpoint}/v1/models; live provider list + cross-provider price index at /live/snapshot.json + /live/models.json.

entries.name: PPQ.AI (PayPerQ)
entries.summary: Pay-per-query access to hundreds of frontier models over Lightning / L402 — no account, no API key, roughly a cent and a half a query.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Pay-per-query frontier-model calls — chat, image, video, audio
entries.auth: none on the L402 path — pay-per-query; or a funded top-up balance
entries.quickstart: Pay per query over Lightning/L402 — no account, no API key on that path; API documented at ppq.ai/api-docs (machine pointer: ppq.ai/llms.txt).

entries.name: LNVPS
entries.summary: A Lightning-native VPS host with Nostr login and no KYC — pay in sats, fund via NWC, spin up a server by API. The most agent-native compute on the consume side.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: VPS compute — provision a server with Nostr login and fund it in sats
entries.payment_detail: Lightning (sats), fundable via NWC; no card
entries.auth: Nostr key is the identity — no email, no KYC
entries.quickstart: Log in with a Nostr key, pick CPU/RAM/SSD, pay the Lightning invoice (or connect a wallet over NWC); automate the same flow via the LNVPS API (github.com/LNVPS/api).

entries.name: BitLaunch
entries.summary: Bitcoin/Lightning VPS provisioning with a real API and SDKs — spin up DigitalOcean/Vultr/Linode servers and pay over Lightning, programmatically. "Programmable servers with programmable money."
entries.what_an_agent_buys: VPS on DigitalOcean / Vultr / Linode capacity, provisioned end-to-end by API
entries.payment_detail: Lightning + on-chain BTC; programmatic via the BitLaunch API (blcli CLI; Go/Python/PHP SDKs)
entries.auth: API token after email signup — no KYC
entries.quickstart: Create an account and an API token, then provision and pay end-to-end with blcli or the Go/Python/PHP SDKs — request, invoice, pay, provision, all programmatic.

entries.name: OpenAgents
entries.summary: A Bitcoin-native marketplace for machine work — sovereign agents hold their own keys, sell spare compute, and get paid in Bitcoin over Lightning, across five interlocking markets.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Machine work — agents buy and sell labor, compute, and data; settlement by zap after verification
entries.custody: self-custodial (BIP39-derived agent wallets; FROSTR threshold signing)
entries.auth: Nostr identity (npub) + a self-custodial Lightning wallet
entries.quickstart: Run Autopilot (desktop) or a Pylon node to offer compute; consumers pay Lightning zaps after the work verifies (pay-after-verify).
entries.note: Early-stage marketplace — built in public, five interlocking markets planned.

entries.name: Bitrefill
entries.summary: The Lightning-native bridge to the rest of the digital economy — buy gift cards and top-ups for thousands of mainstream services with Bitcoin, via a real API, no KYC.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Gift cards and prepaid top-ups for thousands of mainstream services — the long-tail bridge
entries.payment_detail: Lightning (native) + on-chain BTC; programmatic via the Thor API
entries.auth: Thor API key (account; no KYC for ordinary purchases)
entries.quickstart: Request a product via the Thor API, receive a Lightning invoice, pay it, get the redemption code back — the whole loop with no human in it.

entries.name: Mullvad VPN
entries.summary: A privacy VPN that takes Lightning with no email and no account profile — just a random account number. The lowest-identity direct-merchant fit for an agent.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: VPN time on a no-identity account — fund a random 16-digit account number with sats
entries.payment_detail: Lightning (native, own node) + on-chain BTC (also cash-by-mail, Monero)
entries.auth: account number only — generated free, no email, no identity
entries.quickstart: Generate an account number, pay a Lightning invoice against it, connect via WireGuard — scriptable, though there is no formal payment API.

entries.name: Boltz
entries.summary: A non-custodial, no-KYC atomic-swap service — swaps settle via shared-preimage HTLCs, so the agent never gives up custody and no account or identity is required.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Atomic swaps — Lightning ↔ on-chain ↔ Liquid, plus Lightning ↔ USDT/USDC
entries.quickstart: Create a swap against the v2 REST API — no account; atomic HTLC settlement keeps custody with the agent throughout (docs: api.docs.boltz.exchange).

entries.name: SideShift.ai
entries.summary: A non-custodial, no-account, no-KYC swap service spanning 200+ assets across 45+ networks — direct-to-wallet conversions with no funds custodied.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Cross-asset swaps across 200+ assets and 45+ networks, direct to wallet
entries.quickstart: Request a quote and create a shift via the REST API — no account; funds settle direct to the destination address (docs.sideshift.ai).

entries.name: Flashnet
entries.summary: A non-custodial, Bitcoin-native DEX/AMM built on Spark — BTC ↔ USDT/USDB/USDC settling in seconds while the agent keeps its keys.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: BTC ↔ stablecoin swaps (USDT, USDB, USDC) on a Bitcoin-native AMM
entries.auth: none — keys stay with the agent
entries.quickstart: Swap BTC ↔ USDT/USDB/USDC on the Spark-native AMM — non-custodial, settles in seconds.

entries.name: SideSwap
entries.summary: A non-custodial, KYC-free swap platform native to the Liquid Network — L-BTC, L-USDt, and tokenized assets on public order books.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: L-BTC ↔ L-USDt and direct asset-to-asset swaps on Liquid order books
entries.quickstart: Trade L-BTC ↔ L-USDt and tokenized assets on Liquid order books via the SideSwap API (sideswap.io/docs).

entries.name: Loop
entries.summary: Lightning Labs' non-custodial liquidity bridge — Loop Out and Loop In move balance between Lightning and on-chain via submarine swaps.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Lightning ↔ on-chain liquidity — non-custodial submarine swaps for LND nodes, fee for service
entries.auth: none — your own LND node is the prerequisite
entries.quickstart: Run loopd against an LND node holding both channel and on-chain balance; loop out / loop in rebalance atomically (a fee to the Loop server applies).

entries.name: Strike
entries.summary: A Bitcoin-only financial app whose defining feature for agents is native Lightning — it converts between a fiat bank balance and Lightning sats at the custodial boundary, sub-second on the Lightning side.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Lightning ↔ fiat conversion at the custodial edge
entries.quickstart: Complete KYC, create an API key, then drive invoices, payments, and fiat↔Lightning conversion via the Strike API (docs.strike.me).

entries.name: River
entries.summary: A US Bitcoin-only financial-services company — buy, sell, hold, with Lightning send/receive on supported products and the RLS Lightning-payments API.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Fiat ↔ BTC (US) plus Lightning payments via the RLS API
entries.quickstart: Complete KYC onboarding, then use the RLS API for Lightning send/receive — a payments API, not buy/sell trading (docs.rls.dev).

entries.name: Kraken
entries.summary: A large, long-established multi-asset exchange with broad fiat pairs and a mature trading API.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Fiat ↔ BTC ↔ stablecoin across many fiat currencies on a mature trading API
entries.quickstart: Complete KYC, create an API key, then full deposit/trade/withdraw over REST + WebSocket (docs.kraken.com).

entries.name: Coinbase
entries.summary: A large, publicly listed multi-asset exchange with broad fiat connectivity and a mature developer platform; co-issuer of USDC.
entries.what_an_agent_buys: Fiat ↔ BTC ↔ USDC via a mature developer platform
entries.quickstart: Complete KYC, create CDP API keys, then Advanced Trade REST/WebSocket for deposit/trade/withdraw (docs.cdp.coinbase.com).
